category_sources: Official GitHub README/search result describes EJDB 2.0 as an embeddable JSON database engine C library.
source_facts.description says it is an embeddable JSON database engine C11 library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is https://ejdb.org for the EJDB project.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the project documentation surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official EJDB site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Softmotions/ejdb; per instructions repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies JSON database and C11 library.
